Defines interrupt numbers for the nrf52840 microcontroller using a reverse IRQ definition macro.

# Purpose
This code defines interrupt numbers specific to the ARM Cortex-M4 and nRF52840 microcontroller. It uses a macro `REVERSE_IRQ_DEF` to map interrupt names to their corresponding interrupt numbers. The code includes a list of interrupts for the nRF52840, such as `POWER_CLOCK`, `RADIO`, and `UART0_UARTE0`, each associated with a unique number. The macro `REVERSE_IRQ_DEF` is defined at the beginning and undefined at the end of the file, indicating that it is used solely for the purpose of this mapping. The code is likely part of a configuration or header file that provides interrupt definitions for use in other parts of a software project.
